creator: jim@blues.ghis.net
text:
On Mon, 05 Jul 1999 at 20:14:21 -0700, Chris Piazza wrote:
> Hi jim,
> 
> This program's get_cpu and get_load functions are littered with
> this type of thing: 
>         if ( (fin = fopen("/proc/stat", "r")) == NULL ) {
> 			return(0);
> 	}
> 
> which makes the program essentially do nothing in FreeBSD (ie.
> the face just looks around and doesn't get bloody).
> 
> Unless you're going to add some patches so it works with FreeBSD
> may I close this PR?

Hi Chris,

Yeah, go ahead and close it.  If I get around to making some patches
I'll re-submit it.
 
Later,
